description_long: This is a round, black ashtray with a deep, bowl-like cavity and a thick, sturdy rim. The rim features four evenly spaced notches, each designed to securely hold a cigarette. The surface is glossy, reflecting light and giving the object a sleek, polished appearance. The interior is smooth and concave, allowing for the collection of ash and cigarette butts. The ashtray appears to be made of a dense, hard material such as ceramic or glass, commonly found in public or semi-public urban environments. Its robust construction suggests durability for repeated use in outdoor or indoor settings.
description: A glossy, black, round ashtray with four cigarette notches and a deep, smooth bowl. Made of hard, durable material, it is designed for urban public use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular shape, glossy finish, and two prominent cigarette notches on the rim.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view highlighting the depth of the bowl and the curvature of the rim with visible notches.
description_view_2: Side view emphasizing the uniformity of the rim and the symmetrical placement of the notches.
description_view_3: Rear view mirroring the front, with the same notches and glossy surface visible.
